failures.description: The Executor selected the wrong item from the search results, identifying the most expensive listed item ($164.46) instead of the cheapest item ($137.17).
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the correct goal and the necessary tool output by index 3. The ProductCatalogSearch result was sorted by ascending price, with item 1240311797 at $137.17 as the first and cheapest available Electric Kettle. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 2243454707 at $164.46 was the cheapest, which contradicts the tool output. This is not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, or missing information; it is an incorrect interpretation/use of the returned evidence.
